dentist.name: Tuğçe Aydın Çiğnaklı
bio: I completed my undergraduate education in Dentistry in 2020 at Istanbul Medipol University Faculty of Dentistry. After graduating, I worked actively for two years at a private practice in Istanbul. Following this period, I established my own practice in the Dalaman district of Muğla, where I began working independently and continue to practice dentistry to this day.

In my professional practice, I base my work on evidence-based approaches guided by scientific data, taking care to create individualized treatment plans through comprehensive, multidisciplinary evaluations tailored to each patient. My main areas of interest include aesthetic dentistry, implantology, prosthetic rehabilitation, and minimally invasive treatment methods.

Placing great importance on my professional development after graduation, I have participated in numerous advanced training and certification programs at both national and international levels. These include training in aesthetic composite restorations, ceramic restorations, implant surgery and superstructure applications, peri-implantitis treatment protocols, the use of PRF–PRP biological materials, botulinum toxin applications, dental photography techniques, and advanced surgical procedures.

In my practice, I adopt an approach that values aesthetic integrity alongside functional recovery, prioritizing long-term biological compatibility and patient satisfaction. I believe that communication established with patients is decisive for treatment success, and I aim to build an informative, transparent, and trust-based doctor-patient relationship throughout the process.

Beyond my professional activities, I am closely interested in animal rights and love of nature. As a dentist who prioritizes quality of life, is committed to ethical values, and closely follows scientific developments, I aim to offer my patients current and holistic solutions.

kvkk.disclaimer: This English text is provided for convenience only. In case of any discrepancy, the Turkish version is legally binding.

information.title: Privacy Notice on the Processing of Personal Data within the Scope of the Appointment Request Form
information.intro: This Privacy Notice has been prepared under the General Data Protection Regulation (“GDPR”) regarding the processing of your personal data in connection with appointment requests submitted through the tugceaydincignakli.com website.

sections.title: 1. Data Controller
paragraphs: Your personal data is processed by Dentist Tuğçe Aydın Çiğnaklı as the data controller.
Contact: info@tugceaydincignakli.com
Address: Merkez, Atatürk Cad. 3.Sokak, 48770 Dalaman/Muğla, Türkiye

sections.title: 2. Personal Data Processed
paragraphs: The following personal data may be processed through the appointment request form:
If you choose to share information in the short note/description field, data that may qualify as health data may also be processed.
items: Full name
Phone number
Email address
Short note/description related to the appointment request
Date and time the request was submitted
IP address, user device/browser information, and system log data

sections.title: 3. Purposes of Processing Personal Data
paragraphs: Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:
items: Receiving your appointment request
Evaluating your appointment request
Contacting you by phone or email
Concluding your request
Ensuring website and system security
Retaining records in the event of potential disputes

sections.title: 4. Method of Collection and Legal Basis
paragraphs: Your personal data is collected electronically when you complete the appointment request form on the tugceaydincignakli.com website.

Personal data such as your name, phone number, and email address may be processed for the purpose of receiving your appointment request and contacting you, based on the legal grounds under the GDPR, including where you have made your data public, where processing is necessary for the establishment, exercise, or defence of legal claims, and where processing is necessary for the legitimate interests of the data controller.
If you share information that qualifies as health data in the short note/description field, such data is processed based on your explicit consent.

sections.title: 5. Transfer of Personal Data
paragraphs: Your personal data is not shared with third parties for marketing or sales purposes.

However, your personal data may be shared with hosting, database, software, email, and technical infrastructure service providers only to the extent necessary to provide the website, server, database, email infrastructure, and technical security services.
If requested lawfully by authorized public institutions and organizations, your personal data may be shared with the relevant authorities.

sections.title: 6. Retention Period
paragraphs: Personal data collected through the appointment request form is retained for 1 year from the conclusion of your appointment request.
At the end of this period, your personal data is deleted, destroyed, or anonymized in accordance with applicable legislation.

If your appointment request leads to an examination, treatment, or patient registration process, the relevant records will be evaluated separately under patient registration procedures and applicable legislation.

sections.title: 7. Rights of the Data Subject
paragraphs: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
You may submit requests regarding these rights to info@tugceaydincignakli.com.
items: To learn whether your personal data is being processed
To request information if it has been processed
To learn the purpose of processing and whether it is used in line with that purpose
To know the third parties to whom it is transferred domestically or abroad
To request correction if it has been processed incompletely or inaccurately
To request deletion or destruction within the framework of the conditions set out in legislation
To object to a result arising against you through analysis of processed data exclusively by automated systems
To request compensation for damage suffered due to unlawful processing

consent.title: Explicit Consent Form within the Scope of the Appointment Request Form
paragraphs: I give my explicit consent for my name, phone number, email address, and short note/description information shared through the appointment request form on the tugceaydincignakli.com website to be processed by Dentist Tuğçe Aydın Çiğnaklı for the purposes of receiving, evaluating, contacting me regarding, and concluding my appointment request.
I also give my explicit consent for any health data that I may share in the short note/description field to be processed solely for the purpose of evaluating my appointment request and contacting me.

I understand that my personal data will not be shared with third parties for marketing or sales purposes; however, it may be shared with relevant technical service providers to the extent necessary to provide website, server, database, email, and technical infrastructure services.
I acknowledge that I give this explicit consent of my own free will, that I may withdraw it at any time, and that I may apply to info@tugceaydincignakli.com to withdraw my consent.
